label: PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction

node.label: PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction
node.definition: PCA, ICA, NMF, and manifold methods compress observations into fewer coordinates while preserving variance, independence, non-negativity, or neighborhood geometry.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction is modeled as depending on Linear algebra, Unsupervised learning and feeding downstream nodes such as Tabular predictive analytics & decision support.
examples: atlas downstream link to Tabular predictive analytics & decision support
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Unsupervised learning.

dependencies.rationale: PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Linear algebra.
PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction follows the learning setup expressed by Unsupervised learning.
PCA, ICA, NMF & manifold reduction consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.
